uniequip_003_skadi2.name: Predatory Habits
uniequip_003_skadi2.EN: ATK +6% when there is an allied unit within range of self or the Seaborn; If the allied unit is an [Abyssal Hunter] Operator, gain ATK +15% instead
uniequip_003_skadi2.CN: 自身或海嗣攻击范围内存在我方干员时, 自身攻击力+6%; 存在 [深海猎人] 干员时改为攻击力+15%
uniequip_003_skadi2.mod: 自身或海嗣攻击范围内存在我方干员时, 自身攻击力+8%, 防御力+6%; 存在 [深海猎人] 干员时攻击力改为+15%, 防御力+6%; 我方干员部署于自身或海嗣范围内后, 自身立刻获得2点技力
uniequip_003_skadi2.upgradeDescription: ATK +8% and DEF +6% when there is an allied unit within range of self or the Seaborn; If the allied unit is an [Abyssal Hunter] Operator, gain ATK +15% and DEF +6% instead; When operator is deployed within range of self or the Seaborn, they immediately gain 2 skill points
